name: Folding@Home
description: Folding@Home is a distributed computing platform for protein-folding and disease research. This script installs the official v8.5 client in a Debian 13 LXC with optional account linking, CPU folding enabled by default, and GPU support through the existing Proxmox GPU passthrough framework.

notes.text: The client package is downloaded from Folding@Home's official package server at download.foldingathome.org, not from GitHub releases.
CPU folding is configured by default and the script sets Folding@Home to use all CPUs visible inside the LXC.
If GPU passthrough is enabled during container creation, the script enables GPU folding configuration and adds a GPU slot automatically.
Use Folding@Home Web Control at https://v8-5.foldingathome.org/ to view and manage linked machines after installation.
